name: sim_weyl_deep_pauli_joint_commute_unsat
scope_note: z3 exclusion of joint commutation for distinct Pauli axes; ENGINE_MATH_REFERENCE.md

z3.reason: SMT exclusion of simultaneous Pauli commutation

joint_pauli_excluded.reason: non-scalar A cannot commute with both sigma_x and sigma_z

single_axis_admissible.reason: A commuting with only sigma_x admits non-scalar solutions

scalar_A_ok.reason: scalar A trivially commutes with all Paulis
